name: Root Beer
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cake (0.03 oz) fresh yeast, dissolved in 1 cup warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake well before using to make root beer. Mix the contents of this bottle with 5 pounds sugar in a large crock or kettle (do not use aluminum).
2. Stir in 5 gallons lukewarm spring water.
3. Dissolve 1/2 of a 0.6-ounce cake fresh yeast in 1 cup warm water.
4. Add the dissolved yeast to the mixture and stir well.
5. Bottle immediately, leaving a 2-inch space at the top of each bottle. Cap or cork tightly.
6. Do not use disposable thin-wall bottles or resealable twist-off caps. Corks must be secured tightly.
7. Set bottles on their sides in a warm place (70°F-80°F) for 1 to 2 days, then store at 40°F-45°F for 3 to 4 more days.
8. Serves chilled. Makes 5 gallons.
9. For change of pace, add 1 teaspoon concentrate to 1 quart lemonade.
